description_long: This is a modern precision sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, tactical chassis. The rifle features a skeletonized adjustable stock for ergonomic support and reduced weight, and a prominent pistol grip for improved handling. Mounted on top is a large telescopic scope, indicating its use for long-range targeting. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine beneath the receiver, and a cylindrical suppressor is attached to the muzzle for noise reduction. The overall finish is matte black with some metallic gray accents, giving it a professional and tactical appearance. The design and features suggest it is intended for specialized use in urban or tactical environments.
description: A modern, tactical sniper rifle with a long barrel, suppressor, scope, and skeletonized adjustable stock in matte black and gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor at the muzzle and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the scope, the skeletonized stock, and the detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the adjustable stock and pistol grip, with the scope and suppressor visible in alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the stock and magazine more visible.
